{{Quote|He can't resist boasting to me. Soon we'll be able to afford whatever we want. A luxury cruiser for our trips to Nuralee. A villa by the Sea of Translucency on Dremulae.|Astri Oddo|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The False Peace">''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]''</ref>}}
'''Nuralee''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Tyus sector/Legends|Tyus sector]]. It had an economic breakdown shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Bog Divinian]], a wealthy landowner with ties to the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].

In the years following the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], Senator Divinian's wife, [[Astri Oddo]], set up a relief movement on Nuralee to petition the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for financial assistance. Oddo hoped the passage of the [[All Planets Relief Fund]] in the Senate would alleviate Nuralee's situation.

{{Planet-stub}}
